info.title: Community Feed API
info.description:
Corgi Commons is a Bluesky feed with inspectable, community-shaped ranking. Approved pilot participants can vote on ranking signals, topic priorities, and content rules; reviewed policy changes are applied before rescoring. Built on AT Protocol.

## Authentication
- **Governance endpoints** require a session cookie or bearer token from `POST /api/governance/auth/login`.
- **Admin endpoints** additionally require the caller's DID to be in the `BOT_ADMIN_DIDS` allowlist.
- **Feed endpoints** are public (called by the Bluesky app). Viewing the feed and using the shadow demo do not require governance access.
- **Transparency endpoints** are public and unauthenticated.

get.description: Returns the DID and feed URIs for this generator. Called by Bluesky for feed discovery.

did.description: Service DID for this feed generator

feeds.description: List of feeds served by this generator

get.description: Returns the DID document for did:web resolution. Used as a fallback — production uses did:plc.
Returns a list of post URIs for the community-governed feed. Called by the Bluesky app. Uses snapshot-based cursors for stable pagination (5-minute TTL).

post.description: AT-URI of the post

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for the next page (absent on last page)

post.description: Receives user interaction signals (requestMore, requestLess, etc.) from Bluesky clients. Requires a valid JWT in the Authorization header. Stored for analytics and scoring feedback.

Authenticate using a Bluesky handle and app password. Returns a session cookie (HttpOnly) and bearer token. Use the cookie for browser-based governance actions, or the bearer token for CLI/MCP clients.

403.description: Valid credentials, but the account is not approved for the pilot.

schema.description: Valid credentials, but the account is not approved for the pilot.

waitlist.description: Discriminator: the client should offer the waitlist.

get.description: Returns the current browser session state. Anonymous callers receive authenticated=false.

post.description: Invalidates the current session and clears the session cookie.

Cast or update your vote for the current epoch. You can vote on algorithm weights, content keywords, topic weights, or any combination. Weights must sum to 1.0. Requires authentication, an active feed subscription, and approved pilot participation when allowlisting is enabled.

epoch_id.description: Epoch the vote was recorded for

is_update.description: True if this updated an existing vote

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's vote for the current active epoch, including weights, keywords, and topic weights.

vote.description: Current weight votes (null if no vote cast)

voted_at.description: When the vote was last cast or updated

get.description: Returns all active topics from the topic catalog with their current community-voted weights. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

voteCount.description: Number of topic weight voters this epoch

get.description: Returns the active epoch's governance weights, vote count, and metadata.

vote_count.description: Number of votes in this epoch

get.description: Returns all epochs with their weights, ordered newest first. Useful for timeline visualization of governance changes.
Compare weights between two epochs, showing the difference for each component.
Returns a paginated list of governance epochs with weights, vote counts, and content rules. Optionally filter by status.
Returns the current active or voting epoch with weights, vote/subscriber counts, voting schedule, and content rules.
Returns full details for a specific epoch including weights, vote statistics (averages and ranges), and content rules.

vote_statistics.description: Aggregate vote statistics (null if no votes)

post.description: Direct epoch transitions are disabled. Use the reviewed voting lifecycle to start voting, close voting, inspect the proposed policy, and approve results.

get.description: Returns Polis conversation info if configured. Currently a placeholder for future deliberation integration.
Returns the current status of the Polis integration roadmap and planned features.
Returns the current epoch's content rules (active keywords) and per-keyword vote statistics. Keywords require 30% voter support to become active.

include_keyword_votes.description: Keyword → vote count map for include keywords

exclude_keyword_votes.description: Keyword → vote count map for exclude keywords

total_voters.description: Number of voters who submitted keyword votes

threshold.description: Minimum votes required for keyword activation

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's current research consent status. Research consent is separate from TOS — declining does not restrict governance access.

post.description: Record or update the user's research consent decision. Consent changes are logged to the audit trail.
Request voting access during the pilot by submitting a Bluesky handle and optional note. The response does not reveal whether the handle was already on the list or approved.

get.description: Returns a full breakdown of why a post is ranked where it is: all 5 component scores (raw, weight, weighted), current rank, and a counterfactual showing what rank it would have with pure engagement sorting.

components.description: All 5 scoring components with raw, weight, and weighted values

governance_weights.description: Per-component weight vector from the current governance epoch.

get.description: Returns bounded aggregate statistics for the current feed including epoch weights, materialized feed-snapshot metrics, governance info, provenance, and optional Gini coefficient.

total_posts_scored.description: Rows in the current materialized feed snapshot.

unique_authors.description: Unique authors in the materialized feed snapshot.

metrics.description: Diversity and comparison metrics (available after first scoring run)

stats_status.description: Provenance for the bounded stats response.

get.description: "What if the weights were different?" Recalculates rankings using stored raw scores with alternate weights. Weights must sum to 1.0.

rank_delta.description: Positive = moved up with alternate weights

get.description: Returns a paginated, append-only audit log of all governance actions. Vote details are redacted to preserve voter privacy (shows counts, not specific votes).
Comprehensive feed health check: current epoch, active weights, vote count, subscriber count, last scoring run, Redis feed size, and sample top-3 post scores with full decomposition.
Returns the current active governance epoch weights used by the scoring pipeline.
Returns the currently active keyword include/exclude content rules from cache or DB.

post.description: Tests content filtering with provided rules against sample posts or a single text string. Returns which posts pass or are filtered and why.

200.description: Result varies by input mode (single text or batch posts)

schema.description: Result varies by input mode (single text or batch posts)

get.description: Returns the current Terms of Service document in Markdown format with version info.
Returns the current Privacy Policy document in Markdown format with version info.
Returns a redacted health status (ok or degraded). Does not expose component details.
Returns 200 if the process is running. Used by Kubernetes liveness probes.
Returns 200 if database and Redis are healthy. Used by Kubernetes readiness probes.
Simple admin test endpoint. Returns timestamp.
Returns a full system overview for the admin dashboard: epoch state, feed stats, scoring info, content rules, subscriber count, and approved pilot participant count.

approvedParticipantCount.description: Approved active feed subscribers currently eligible for pilot governance

get.description: Lists recent governance epochs with their weights, vote counts, and status.

patch.description: Updates the active epoch voting window or auto-transition settings.

post.description: Direct epoch transitions are disabled. Use the voting lifecycle: start voting, close voting, review results, then approve the complete policy.

get.description: Lists the most recent bot announcements posted to the feed.

post.description: Posts a custom announcement to Bluesky via the bot (rate-limited).

get.description: Returns detailed feed ingestion and scoring health statistics.

post.description: Triggers a manual reconnect cycle for Jetstream ingestion.
Manually triggers the scoring pipeline to rescore the feed.

get.description: Returns detailed health status for all system components (database, Redis, Jetstream, scoring). Requires admin access.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the health check

last_event_age_ms.description: Age of the last received event in ms

is_running.description: Whether a scoring run is in progress

last_run_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last scoring run

post.description: Manually triggers the retention cleanup job: hard-deletes unscored posts past retention, orphaned likes/reposts/post_engagement, stale likes/reposts, and old follows. Requires admin access.

success.description: False if a cleanup run was already in progress

get.description: View recent admin/system governance actions with optional filters by action type or actor DID. Unlike the transparency audit log, this returns unredacted actor DIDs.

Performs sensitivity analysis on current governance weights. Shows how the top-N posts are ranked, which scoring component dominates each, and how ±10% weight shifts would affect rankings. Uses live feed from Redis + score decomposition from PostgreSQL.
Returns the epoch scheduler status and any pending auto-transitions.

post.description: Manually triggers the epoch scheduler to check for pending auto-transitions. Logged to audit trail.

get.description: Returns a full governance overview: the current round, all recent rounds (up to 30), current weights, content keywords, and voting schedule.

post.description: Opens a voting period on the current round. Optionally announces to Bluesky.
Closes the current voting period, aggregates votes, and moves the round to results phase. Optionally announces to Bluesky.
Approves aggregated voting results, applying the proposed signal weights, topic weights, and content rules to the active epoch before triggering a rescore.
Rejects the proposed voting results and returns the round to running phase. Weights remain unchanged.
Schedules a voting period to start automatically at a future time. Announces the schedule to Bluesky.

get.description: Returns upcoming and recently past scheduled voting periods.

patch.description: Admin override of include/exclude keyword lists on the current epoch. Triggers a rescore.

post.description: Adds a single keyword to either the include or exclude list. Triggers a rescore.

delete.description: Removes a keyword from the include or exclude list. Removing the last include keyword requires confirm=true. Triggers a rescore.

patch.description: Admin override of governance weights on the current epoch. Partial updates supported — omitted weights keep their current value. Result is normalized to sum to 1.0. Triggers a rescore.

post.description: Extends the current voting period by the specified number of hours. Only works while voting is open.
Deprecated compatibility alias for approving an already-reviewed results phase. It cannot bypass voting closure or results review.

appliedWeights.description: Whether aggregated weights were applied (false if no votes)

get.description: Returns full detail for a specific governance round including starting/ending weights, vote configurations, duration, and audit trail.

post.description: Direct round transitions are disabled. Use start voting, end voting, results review, and approval so the complete policy is applied before rescoring.

get.description: Today's live stats, yesterday's pre-aggregated stats, and a 7-day trend of total requests, unique viewers, scroll depth, and returning viewers.
Returns a histogram of scroll depth by session for the last 7 days, bucketed by page count.
Returns overall engagement attribution stats (served vs engaged, likes, reposts) and a breakdown by feed position bucket for the last 7 days.
Returns engagement stats across all epochs for chart rendering, including feed loads, viewers, and engagement rates.
Returns per-keyword engagement rates from the current active epoch, along with the current keyword rules for context.
Analytics from the sendInteractions API (requestMore, requestLess). Shows totals by type (today, yesterday, 7-day), per-epoch breakdown, and top posts by signal ratio.
Returns all active (non-removed) approved participants for private feed mode.

post.description: Adds an approved participant by DID or Bluesky handle. Handles are resolved to DIDs via AT Protocol.

did.description: DID of participant (provide did or handle)

handle.description: Bluesky handle (resolved to DID if no did provided)

delete.description: Soft-removes a participant by setting removed_at. Does not delete the record.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: DID of the participant to remove

get.description: Returns voting-pilot waitlist requests filtered by status (default pending), oldest first.

post.description: Resolves the stored handle to a DID, adds it to approved_participants (re-activating a previously removed row if needed), and marks the request approved. Fails with 400 if the handle cannot be resolved — the row stays pending and the account can be added by DID via the participants API.
Marks a pending waitlist request as rejected. The handle can still be approved later via the participants API.

get.description: Returns anonymized vote records for a given epoch. Only includes votes from subscribers with research consent. Supports JSON (default) or CSV format.

200.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

schema.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

get.description: Returns full score decomposition (raw, weight, weighted per component) for an epoch. Paginated. Supports JSON (default) or CSV format. Golden Rule: all components stored.

200.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

schema.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

get.description: Returns anonymized engagement attribution data for an epoch. Only includes records from subscribers with research consent. Supports JSON (default) or CSV format.

200.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

schema.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

get.description: Returns metadata for all governance epochs including weights, vote counts, content rules, and topic weights. Supports JSON (default) or CSV format.

200.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

schema.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

get.description: Returns anonymized governance audit log entries with optional date range filtering. DIDs are scrubbed from details. Supports JSON (default) or CSV format.

200.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

schema.description: JSON response (format=json). CSV format returns text/csv file download.

get.description: Generates and downloads a ZIP archive containing all anonymized data for an epoch: votes.csv, scores.csv, engagement.csv, epoch_metadata.json, topics/catalog.json, and topics/community-weights.json.

200.description: ZIP archive containing CSV and JSON files for the epoch

get.description: Returns all topics in the catalog with post counts and current community weights from the active epoch.

post.description: Creates a new topic in the catalog with terms, context terms, and anti-terms for keyword classification.
Classifies text against the current taxonomy using keyword matching. If embedding classifier is available, includes a comparison result.
Re-classifies all existing posts for the given topic. Processes in batches of 500.

patch.description: Updates a topic's fields. Only provided fields are changed. Terms are normalized to lowercase.

delete.description: Soft deactivates a topic (sets is_active = false). Does not delete from DB — topic vectors referencing it stay valid.

get.description: Aggregates disk, database, Redis, ingestion, scoring, feed, cleanup, and engagement health into a single response.

tags.name: Feed
tags.description: AT Protocol feed endpoints (called by Bluesky app)

tags.name: Governance
tags.description: Voting, epochs, weights, and community governance

tags.name: Topics
tags.description: Topic catalog and topic weight voting

tags.name: Transparency
tags.description: Score explanations, feed stats, and audit logs

tags.name: Demo

tags.description: Legal documents (terms of service, privacy policy)
